projects.name: IOS Village
projects.description: A classic, medium-scale resort located at Km 88. It is known for its Greek-island inspired white architecture and calm family atmosphere.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Private Beach Access, Kids Area, Supermarket

projects.name: Palace Beach Resort
projects.description: A beachfront hotel located in Sidi Abdel Rahman. It functions primarily as a hotel with direct beach access rather than a residential compound.
projects.amenities: Direct Beach Access, Outdoor Pool, Restaurant, Sea View Rooms

projects.name: Mirage Hotel Sidi Abd El Rahman
Zaino Beach
projects.description: Located at Km 83, Zizinia Rose is known for its extensive greenery and gardens (approx. 80% of the project). It offers a serene environment.
projects.amenities: Lush Gardens, Swimming Pools, Shopping Mall, Mosque

projects.name: North coast badr
projects.description: A cooperative village at Km 82 famous for housing the 'Zahran Market'. It is a high-density, lively village popular for rentals.
projects.amenities: Zahran Market (Hypermarket), Cinema Complex, Swimming Pools, Cafes

projects.name: Mina Village 1
projects.description: One of the first luxury resorts on the coast (Km 85). Features a distinct U-shaped layout focusing on a large central sandy beach area.
projects.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse, Walking Promenade, Sports Courts

projects.name: Marina Sunshine
projects.description: Located at Km 87, Marina Sunshine is a cozy resort known for its yellow-painted architecture and direct beach access. It offers a quieter alternative to the bustling Marina El Alamein gates.
projects.amenities: Private Sandy Beach, Swimming Pools, Beach Bar, Supermarket

projects.name: Long Beach North Coast
projects.description: Also known as Citystars North Coast (or Lagoon), this massive project at Km 113 features a large crystal lagoon system and is located directly opposite the Presidential Palace.
projects.amenities: Crystal Lagoons, Citystars Mall, Fairmont Hotel, Aqua Park

projects.name: Green beach Sea view Chalet
projects.description: One of the classic resorts at Km 89. It is famous for its long-standing community, lush gardens, and wide sandy beach. A favorite for traditional family summers.
projects.amenities: Ladies' Private Pool, Cinema, Commercial Market, Mosque

projects.name: Beausite Resort
projects.description: A prestigious hotel and resort brand originally famous in Marsa Matrouh. This North Coast location offers hotel-serviced chalets and rooms with high hospitality standards.
projects.amenities: Hotel Service, Private Beach, International Dining, Spa & Wellness

projects.name: ARIBA NORTH COAST
projects.description: Located at Km 90, Ariba is a modern resort spanning 19 acres. It features terraced architecture ensuring sea views and a sleek, contemporary design.
projects.amenities: Swimmable Lagoons, Commercial Mall, Boutique Hotel, Beach Club

projects.name: Marina Gardens Village
projects.description: Located near Marina El Alamein (Km 90), offering a garden-centric living environment with chalet blocks surrounding pools.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Landscaped Areas, Supermarket, Security

projects.name: Diamond Beach Village
projects.description: Located at Km 90, known for its clean beach and family atmosphere. It has undergone renovations to modernize its amenities.
projects.amenities: Aqua Park, Swimming Pools, Beach Activities, Commercial Zone

projects.name: Aqua View Resort
projects.description: Located at Km 91. As the name suggests, it focuses heavily on water entertainment with multiple slides and pools.
projects.amenities: Aqua Park, Indoor Pool, Hotel Services, Kids Club

projects.name: Village of Dreams
projects.description: A traditional cooperative village at Km 93. It offers affordable summer homes and is known for its long, wide beach.
projects.amenities: Large Swimming Pools, Beach Cafeteria, Mosque, Supermarket

projects.name: Marina Beach 1
projects.description: The first gate of the legendary Marina El Alamein project. It features the widest beaches in the development and houses several luxury villas and palaces.
projects.amenities: Private Yacht Marina, Jetty, Water Sports, Gated Security

projects.name: Marina Hills Residence
projects.description: A residential apartment complex located just south of the main Marina road. It offers serviced apartments and studio rentals.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pool, Housekeeping, Parking, Security

projects.name: Marina Plaza Resort
projects.description: A hotel located within the Porto Marina complex. It offers direct access to the Porto Marina mall, promenade, and yacht activities.
projects.amenities: Shopping Mall Access, Hotel Pool, Marina View, Restaurants

projects.name: Meals On Wheels
projects.description: A popular open-air dining hub located on the North Coast road. Features food trucks and pop-up restaurants from famous Cairo brands.
projects.amenities: Food Trucks, Outdoor Seating, Parking, Restrooms

projects.name: Sea Gull Marina Hotel
projects.description: A classic hotel located directly on the marina waterfront (Gate 2 area). It is known for its proximity to the main marina promenade and yacht docking areas.
projects.amenities: Marina View Rooms, Outdoor Swimming Pool, Promenade Access, Restaurant

projects.name: Porto marina chalet
projects.description: The low-rise chalet section of the Porto Marina complex, offering a more quiet experience while retaining access to the mall and aqua park.
projects.amenities: Shared Pools, Garden Views, Access to Porto Mall, Housekeeping

projects.name: Porto Marina
projects.description: The first international-standard resort on the North Coast. Designed as a 'Venice of Egypt' with circular canals, it features a massive mall, hotel towers, and a lively boardwalk.
projects.amenities: Porto Marina Mall, Venetian Canals (Gondolas), Aqua Park, Cinema Complex

projects.name: Porto Marina Tower 6
projects.description: A specific high-rise within Porto Marina known for its prime location overlooking the main lagoon and proximity to the cinema complex.
projects.amenities: Lagoon Views, Elevator Access, Concierge, Private Pool Access

projects.name: Aqua Fun Marina
projects.description: A hotel located inside Marina El Alamein (Gate 2/3 area). It offers a budget-friendly hotel stay with access to Marina's beaches.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pools, Water Slides, Buffet Restaurant, Animation Team

projects.name: Palms beach
projects.description: A designated beach zone within Marina El Alamein. Popular for day-use access and water sports rentals.
projects.amenities: Sandy Beach, Beach Bar, Showers & Changing Rooms, Water Sports

projects.name: Marina 7
projects.description: The most prestigious gate of Marina El Alamein. It is strictly for villas and features private lagoon docks for almost every unit.
projects.amenities: Private Yacht Docks, Secluded Lagoons, High Security, Villa-only Zone

projects.name: Beach Bobos Golden
projects.description: A popular beach club venue located in the Marina/New Alamein area. Known for parties, music, and beach dining.
projects.amenities: Beach Bar, DJ/Music, Loungers, Dining Area

projects.name: Rixos Premium Alamein
projects.description: A world-class 5-star hotel located in New Alamein. It features iconic high-rise towers and offers the signature Rixos 'All-Inclusive' luxury experience.
projects.amenities: Anjana Spa, Infinity Pools, Fine Dining Restaurants, Private Cabanas

projects.name: Azur One Eleven - New Alamein
projects.description: A prime business and commercial complex located in New Alamein City, offering office spaces and retail outlets.
projects.amenities: Office Spaces, Retail Showrooms, Meeting Rooms, Underground Parking

projects.name: Stella Marina
projects.description: A Stella-branded hotel/resort located strategically near the Marina El Alamein gates, providing hotel suites.
projects.amenities: Swimming Pool, Restaurant, Housekeeping, Shuttle to Beach

projects.name: Azur One Eleven Hotel Alamein
projects.description: The hospitality component of the One Eleven project in New Alamein. A modern hotel catering to business and leisure travelers in the new city.
projects.amenities: Business Center, Gym, Restaurant, City Views

projects.name: Gewan Palace New Alamein
projects.description: A project in New Alamein featuring 'Palace' style architecture. It offers residential units and chalets with a focus on affordable luxury.
projects.amenities: Artificial Lakes, Commercial Mall, Swimming Pools, Landscape Gardens

projects.name: Gewan Resort New Alamein
projects.description: A residential project in New Alamein offering a mix of chalets and studios. It is designed to provide affordable entry into the New Alamein lifestyle.
projects.amenities: Artificial Lakes, Commercial Mall, Kids Area, Gym

projects.name: Downtown New Alamein
projects.description: The vibrant heart of New Alamein City. It features residential apartment buildings surrounding lively piazzas and high-street retail zones.
projects.amenities: Retail Piazzas, Underground Parking, Bike Lanes, Health Club

projects.name: Mazarine
projects.description: The first gated villa community in New Alamein. Located on a 707-acre area, it features lagoons and islands, offering privacy within the city.
projects.amenities: Swimmable Lagoons, Private Beach Access, Clubhouse, Promenade

projects.name: Plage
projects.description: Mountain View's latest 2024 launch in Sidi Abdel Rahman. A boutique coastal project featuring 'The Lighthouse' experiential zone and Greek-inspired villas.
projects.amenities: The Lighthouse (Community Hub), Sandy Lagoons, Beach Club, Interactive Workshops

projects.name: Saada North Coast
projects.description: An ultra-luxury project near Ras El Hekma. Known for its branded villas, partnership with Emirati investment, and high-end finishing.
projects.amenities: Private Beachfront, Branded Clubhouses, Concierge Services, Fine Dining Hub

projects.name: Golf Solimania
projects.dev: شركه مصر للتنميه السياحيه - Misr Tourism Development Company

Gaia Ras El Hekma.description: Inspired by the Greek Goddess of Earth, Gaia is a 280-acre coastal destination blending seaside charm with modern needs. Designed by Chapman Taylor, it features diverse architectural styles (Modern, Arabian, Hacienda) and dedicates 45,000 m2 to water features.
Gaia Ras El Hekma.amenities: Private sandy beach, 45,000 m2 of water features and pools, KYND 01 Hotel, Bar Du Port dining, Sports zone and outdoor gym, Commercial strip

La Vista Ras El Hikma.description: Stretching across 1,200 acres, La Vista Ras El Hikma features a terraced layout ensuring sea views for most units. The design prioritizes privacy, green spaces, and lifestyle convenience.
La Vista Ras El Hikma.amenities: Terraced units with sea views, Grand Hotel, Sports venues, Beach pools and clubhouse, Aquapark

Playa Ras El Hekma.description: A refined coastal project by New Giza, featuring exclusive beach houses designed with modern aesthetics by Alchemy Architecture.
Playa Ras El Hekma.amenities: Exclusive beach clubhouse, Boutique retail areas, Swimming pools, Landscaped promenade

Youd Ras El-Hekma.description: A newly launched (2025) integrated community located at Km 187, Ras El Hekma. It sits adjacent to Salt and Katameya Coast, featuring a terraced design where 90% of units have sea views.
Youd Ras El-Hekma.amenities: 1km Beachfront, Swimmable Lagoons, Boutique Hotel, Sports District

Menna 5.description: Located at Km 201, Mena 5 is a boutique resort spanning 60 feddans. It is known for its privacy, limited number of units (546), and a fully serviced hotel.
Menna 5.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse (Gym, Sauna), Sunset Patio, 372-room Hotel

Masyaf Ras Al Hekma.description: A Greek-inspired sanctuary at Km 212. It features a natural, simplified architecture style ('El Masyaf' meaning 'The Summer House') with a focus on raw materials and crystal lagoons.
Masyaf Ras Al Hekma.amenities: Barbarossa Beach Club, Boutique Cabanas, Crystal Lagoons, Lemonade Fashion Store

Ras El Hekma Chalet.description: The coordinates provided point to the Mountain View Ras El Hekma complex. This is likely a private resale or rental listing within the compound.
Ras El Hekma Chalet.amenities: 19 Swimming Pools, Ladies Beach, Agora Commercial Hub, Promenade

Silversands.description: Premium luxury destination by Naguib Sawiris (Ora), known for its 'Grenada' unmatched luxury style and vibrant nightlife.
Silversands.amenities: Boutique Hotels, Nightlife venues, 1km beachfront, Health spa

AZHA North.description: A luxurious 250-acre resort featuring 12km of waterfront and crystal lagoons, offering a mix of standalone villas and chalets.
AZHA North.amenities: 45-acre Crystal Lagoons, 5-star Hotel, Community Centers, Sports Facilities

SEASHELL Ras El Hekma.description: Distinct from the Sidi Abdel Rahman project, Seashell Playa is located in Ras El Hekma. It features the signature Alchemy Architecture minimalist style and an exclusive beach club.
SEASHELL Ras El Hekma.amenities: Playa Beach Club, Minimalist Beach Houses, Fine Dining Venues, Water Sports Center

Ramla.description: Located at Km 215, Ramla is designed around the concept of a 'Beach Town'. It features a 1.4km beachfront and a design that integrates swimmable lagoons with natural topography.
Ramla.amenities: The Farm (Social Hub), Village Street, Sports Campus, Swimmable Lagoons

Ogami Ras El Hekma.description: SODIC's newest launch in Ras El Hekma, inspired by Japanese aesthetics. It focuses on 'Zen' luxury, featuring minimalist architecture, sunset-oriented layouts, and a Nobu Hotel.
Ogami Ras El Hekma.amenities: Nobu Hotel & Restaurant, Sunset Lounge, Swimmable Lagoons, Wellness Sancutary

Summer Ras el hekma.description: A massive coastal city in Sidi Heneish designed to be a vibrant summer capital. It features extensive green spines and water bodies connecting the entire project to the sea.
Summer Ras el hekma.amenities: Sports District, Commercial Promenade, Water Activities Center, Family Entertainment Hub

Beit Al Bahr.description: A boutique hotel and resort in Sidi Heneish known for its simplicity and direct connection to nature. It offers a raw, authentic beach experience away from commercial noise.
Beit Al Bahr.amenities: Private Sandy Beach, Beachfront Restaurant, Boutique Hotel, Water Sports

El Masyaf.description: Located at Km 212, El Masyaf revives the classic summer vibe with modern luxury, featuring lagoon-front homes and step-down architecture.
El Masyaf.amenities: El Lokanda Boutique Hotel, Beach playground, Driver's housing, Mosque

The Med.description: A 307-acre coastal town designed to maximize sea views, featuring an 800m beachfront and a unique 110,000 sqm swimmable lagoon.
The Med.amenities: The Peninsula (Tropical Island), Waterfall Lagoons, Campbell Gray Hotel, Sports Park

Hyde Park North - Seashore.description: Master-planned by EDSA, Seashore covers 240 acres with a valley-based design ensuring sea views from almost every unit.
Hyde Park North - Seashore.amenities: 25 beach-entry swimming pools, 550m private beach, Commercial Strip, Beach Cabanas

June.description: A Miami-inspired Art Deco beach town by SODIC, offering pedestrian-friendly tracks and a vibrant boardwalk atmosphere.
June.amenities: Boardwalk, Hotel-serviced apartments, Eco-friendly infrastructure, Clubhouse

Seazen.description: A 204-feddan sanctuary featuring cascading elevations that allow 85% of units to have sea views. Home to the first wave pool in the North Coast.
Seazen.amenities: Wave Pool (6,000 sqm), 3 Clubhouses, Indoor heated pools, Game room and courts

Sky North.description: Located in the emerging Sidi Heneish region, characterized by crystal clear waters. It focuses on luxury chalets with roof-top amenities ('Sky' concept).
Sky North.amenities: Sky Roof Pools, Commercial Area, Aqua Park, Gym & Spa

Safia - Ras El Hekma.description: A 180-acre terraced project ensuring high visibility of the sea. Designed by Raef Fahmi, it blends natural topography with ultra-modern luxury.
Safia - Ras El Hekma.amenities: Elevated Clubhouse, Boutique Hotel, Beach Promenade, Yoga Platforms

Royal beach.description: A cozy, family-friendly resort in Ras El Hekma. It offers a quieter alternative to the mega-projects, focusing on chalets and direct beach access.
Royal beach.amenities: Swimming Pools, Kids Playground, Beach Cafe, Mini Market

Mountain View.description: A Greek-island-inspired community (Santorini style) offering a quintessential summer life with white and blue architecture.
Mountain View.amenities: Ladies Beach, Agora Commercial Area, 19 Swimming Pools, Crystal Lagoons

Salt.description: Spanning 294 acres, Salt offers a marina-front lifestyle with 830m of beachfront and lagoon-front homes.
Salt.amenities: Marina, Commercial Hub, Lagoons, Spa & Wellness Center

Mar Bay - Ras El Hekma.description: Al Marasem's flagship coastal project, featuring a mix of beachfront villas and lagoon-front chalets. Known for high construction quality and 'Floating' amenities.
Mar Bay - Ras El Hekma.amenities: Floating Restaurant, Beach Clubhouse, Swimmable Lagoons, International Hotel

Lyv Caesar - Ras El Hekma.description: Located directly next to the elite Caesar SODIC. It maximizes the 'Sidi Heneish' vibe with terraced levels (up to 40m high) to ensure sea views for all residents.
Lyv Caesar - Ras El Hekma.amenities: 100% Sea View Units, Sandy Beachfront, Boutique Commercial Hub, Sports Facilities

Caesar.description: One of the most exclusive communities in the North Coast, known for its privacy, elite resident profile, and simple yet luxurious 'Sidi Heneish-style' architecture.
Caesar.amenities: Private Beach, Clubhouse, Beach Restaurant, Sea-view terraces

Hacienda Waters.description: The newest addition to the Hacienda family, offering a water-centric lifestyle with swimmable lagoons and the first-of-its-kind water activities in the region.
Hacienda Waters.amenities: Swimmable Lagoons, Water Sports Center, Boutique Hotel, Kids Aqua Park

Hacienda West.description: A boutique 137-feddan resort designed for those seeking a younger, more vibrant summer vibe. Known for its 'boho-chic' style and proximity to Fouka Bay.
Hacienda West.amenities: World-class boutique hotel, Community sports hub, Beach bars and nightlife, Fully finished cabanas

Koun.description: A 106-acre project featuring 100% waterfront views for all units (either sea or lagoon). Designed by Ismail Habruk, it emphasizes modern architecture and water integration.
Koun.amenities: 10 acres of swimmable lagoons, Commercial strip, Clubhouse, Bicycle lanes

Direction White.description: A luminous, white-themed resort located at Km 192. It is distinguished by its elevation (up to 44m above sea level), ensuring panoramic sea views.
Direction White.amenities: Luminous Clubhouse, 5-star Hotel, Wave Lake, Underground parking

Telal North Coast.description: A well-established project in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 143). Famous for its elevated topography offering panoramic sea views and its twin-house dominated masterplan.
Telal North Coast.amenities: Panoramic Sea Views, Multiple Clubhouses, Commercial Area, Beach Activities

Amwaj.description: One of the most popular and lively resorts in Sidi Abdel Rahman (Km 136). Known for its Asian-resort style architecture and the 'Rivette' commercial mall.
Amwaj.amenities: Rivette Mall, Ladies Beach, Interactive Fountain, Penguins Kids Club

Solare.description: An Italian-inspired coastal town at Km 199. It features 1km of beachfront and 10 zones tailored to different experiences, from serene living to active sports.
Solare.amenities: 1km Private Beach, Retail Promenade, Sports District, Wellness Centers

Marassi.description: The premier luxury destination on the North Coast. Features an international marina, a signature golf course, and 23 distinct residential villages.
Marassi.amenities: Marassi Marina (Yacht Club), 18-Hole Golf Course, Mporium Mall, Multiple World-Class Hotels

Hacienda Bay.description: A massive 2.4 million sqm resort at Km 124. Famous for its Sanford-designed golf course and 'Lake Yard', the coast's most popular dining hub.
Hacienda Bay.amenities: 18-Hole Championship Golf Course, Lake Yard, The Hotel, Cabanas & Chalets

IOS Village.description: A classic, medium-scale resort located at Km 88. It is known for its Greek-island inspired white architecture and calm family atmosphere.
IOS Village.amenities: Swimming Pools, Private Beach Access, Kids Area, Supermarket

Palace Beach Resort.description: A beachfront hotel located in Sidi Abdel Rahman. It functions primarily as a hotel with direct beach access rather than a residential compound.
Palace Beach Resort.amenities: Direct Beach Access, Outdoor Pool, Restaurant, Sea View Rooms

Beitna Family Motel.description: A budget-friendly boutique motel located in the Sidi Abdel Rahman area. It offers simple, family-oriented accommodation with a swimming pool and close proximity to the Alamein attractions.
Beitna Family Motel.amenities: Outdoor Swimming Pool, Family Rooms, Restaurant, Private Parking

Casa Cook North Coast.description: An upscale, adults-only lifestyle hotel located within Hacienda White. It features a boho-chic design, a private lagoon, and a focus on wellness and relaxation.
Casa Cook North Coast.amenities: Private Lagoon Access, Yoga Studio, Gourmet Dining, Desert-style Architecture

Mirage Hotel Sidi Abd El Rahman.description: A 4-star hotel located in Sidi Abdel Rahman (near Blumar). It provides a comfortable base for visitors wanting to explore the bay's beaches without renting a private villa.
Mirage Hotel Sidi Abd El Rahman.amenities: Private Beach Area, Outdoor Pool, Restaurant & Bar, Concierge Services

Zahra.description: A massive 900-acre project located in the Golden Square of Sidi Abdel Rahman. It is a mixed-use city featuring international hotels, a downtown district, and modern architecture.
Zahra.amenities: 5 International Hotels, Central Park, Downtown Zahra (Retail), Sports Club

SouthMed.description: A colossal 23-million sqm global destination by TMG. It features the world's largest marina, a golf course, and a fully integrated smart city infrastructure.
SouthMed.amenities: International Marina, Championship Golf Course, Crystal Lagoons, Wellness District

Julyana.description: A family resort located at Km 65. It is known for its affordable chalets and direct sea view units, making it popular for middle-income families.
Julyana.amenities: Swimming Pools, Aqua Park, Shopping Mall, Mosque

Balm beach.description: Located at Km 68, Palm Beach offers a tropical aesthetic with plenty of palm trees and pools. It is a lively resort with an active aqua park.
Balm beach.amenities: Aqua Park, Ladies' Covered Pool, Commercial Area, Football Court

Retal view north.description: A 4-star hotel and aqua park resort located at Km 77. It functions as a hotel with full amenities, popular for short weekend stays.
Retal view north.amenities: Large Aqua Park, Private Beach, Kids Club, Buffet Restaurant

Marina Flowers Village.description: Located at Km 80, this resort is designed with a high percentage of green landscapes (flowers). It offers a quiet, garden-like atmosphere near the sea.
Marina Flowers Village.amenities: Landscaped Gardens, Swimming Pools, Social Club, Supermarket

Santorini Resort.description: A smaller resort at Km 82 modeled after the Greek island of Santorini. It features white and blue architecture and terraced units.
Santorini Resort.amenities: Greek-style Architecture, Swimming Pools, Sports Court, Retail Shops

Zaino Beach.description: Located at Km 83, Zizinia Rose is known for its extensive greenery and gardens (approx. 80% of the project). It offers a serene environment.
Zaino Beach.amenities: Lush Gardens, Swimming Pools, Shopping Mall, Mosque

Plage.description: Mountain View's latest 2024 launch in Sidi Abdel Rahman. A boutique coastal project featuring 'The Lighthouse' experiential zone and Greek-inspired villas.
Plage.amenities: The Lighthouse (Community Hub), Sandy Lagoons, Beach Club, Interactive Workshops

Saada North Coast.description: An ultra-luxury project near Ras El Hekma. Known for its branded villas, partnership with Emirati investment, and high-end finishing.
Saada North Coast.amenities: Private Beachfront, Branded Clubhouses, Concierge Services, Fine Dining Hub

Kai.amenities: 33 acres, kite surfing center, clubhouse, commercial strip, boutique hotel
Kai.description: A boutique resort focusing on luxury, comfort, and water sports, offering a serene escape.

Blue Blue.amenities: 121,000 sqm, waterfalls, river walk, beach activities, kite surfing
Blue Blue.description: Located in the windmill area for fresh air, offering a variety of water features and entertainment options.
